word: H5541 - סָלָה - çâlâh - saw-law' - Tread down

sections.paragraph:
Original: סלה

Transliteration: sâlâh

Phonetic: saw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to make light of, toss aside
    1. (Qal) to make light of
    2. (Piel) to flout, reject
  2. to weigh, balance
    1. (Pual) to be weighed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1502,1503

Part(s) of speech: Verb
